creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
Hi,

        Sorry folks - I didn't notice that I'd never put that .gz up on
the site in the first place. So I got my stuff together and did an
upgrade to my krogue port. The current version (krogue 0.9.6) is
available on my website as

        http://www.psn.net/~andrews/krogue.shar.gz

If possible, could a committer please take care of this as soon as possible?
I'd love to see it go into 4.0-RELEASE. :-)

Thanks!

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
